name: xdebug-mcp
description: Drive PHP/Xdebug debugging sessions through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Debug PHP with Xdebug through MCP
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to PHP/Xdebug sessions through a small MCP server that can listen for DBGp connections, inspect sessions, step execution, manage breakpoints, and read variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Xdebug MCP tools when working on PHP debugging tasks. Start the listener, run or attach to a PHP/Xdebug session, inspect the current location and variables, then step or manage breakpoints as needed.
